findings.summary: IPC Foundations & Channels Registry refactoring passes 13/14 checks. Magic strings eliminated, channel constants centralized, cross-reference verified. TypeScript typecheck fails with 30+ refactoring-caused errors rooted in 3 issues: missing ipc-validation.ts module, staged-deleted preload/types.ts, and narrow getStore() type signature.
